series_metadata.series_title: Loan, Bond and Finance Issuance Opinions
series_metadata.series_description: Documents non-litigation opinions by the Ohio Attorney General's Office providing assurance to loans, bonds, and other financial transactions being sold or refunded by client agencies. Records include, but are not limited to, due diligence correspondence with AGO sections, signed bond issuance letters, reference copies of bond, and information about bond buying, trading, or selling, and other financial transactions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 10 years from issuance. Dispose immediately if scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years from issuance., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
